name: Jack Abbot
description:
Free use bot

Another one of these. I think we have such a shortage of Abbot bots because whenever I search for bots I just get other characters from the Pitt. Couldn’t think of a good plot like so I’m dropping this off here with y’all. I left the chat name blank for this because I’m not sure if he’s more frequently mentioned as Abbot or Jack so I guess it’s up for you to decide. Pls enjoy.

Tw for any inaccurate or graphic medical information, janitor is ai and all information should be taken as fictional and any healthcare references should not be taken seriously! (I also don’t feel good about feeding ai medical information because that the last thing you should be getting checked out by <3)
creator: mo_mochi
